name: Halden Marrick
shortDescription: Hold-trained soldier on his first frontier posting, carrying more certainty than he's earned.
description: Six years in the gate-guard of Karn Doral, drilled with axe and shield since he was old enough to hold a haft. He topped every muster, took the cohort bouts two seasons running, and wears the marks to prove it — but the mountain stayed at peace the whole while, and not one of those bouts ever drew real blood. He mustered out the day his term ended and came straight down to the Reach, certain his name was about to start meaning something. He talks like a man who's seen things he hasn't, keeps his armour mirror-bright, and has yet to learn that the frontier doesn't grade on form. Brave to a fault, quick to stand for a stranger, and privately terrified that the first real fight will show him what the drills never could.
